description: Message templates for each reply mode and trigger event. TemplateRenderer populates {{placeholder}} variables from the Context Bundle. AI draft call receives the rendered scaffold, not a blank prompt.
placeholder_syntax: {{variable_name}} — replaced by TemplateRenderer with values from Context Bundle

columns.name: trigger_event
columns.description: When this template is used. Maps to intent or lifecycle event.

columns.name: reply_mode
columns.description: acknowledge | quote | logistics | ask_once | escalate | post_event | deposit_chase | none

columns.name: subject_template
columns.description: Email subject line with placeholders. Null for SMS.

columns.name: body_template
columns.description: Full message body with {{placeholders}}. AI polishes tone but must not change facts.

nkr_seed_data.body_template:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks for reaching out!

To get you an accurate quote, I just need one thing: {{missing_field_question}}

Once I have that I'll get your quote over right away.
— Harkirat | Nova Kingdom Rentals | 902-990-0005

Thanks for booking with Nova Kingdom Rentals!
nkr_seed_data.body_template:

Hope {{event_date}} was a fantastic time! It was great being part of it.

{{google_review_url}}

Hope to see you again next season!

nkr_seed_data.body_template: {{first_name}}, Harkirat here. Due to {{cancellation_reason}}, I can't safely deliver this weekend. Your deposit carries forward to any new date — priority pick guaranteed. I'll reach out personally to reschedule. — 902-990-0005
